case_title: KENDALL WAVILLE et al VS. BRIAN WARD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,793.71 FILED BY WAVILLE, KENDALL MAYALL, TESS PEDERSEN, RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, BRIAN WARD, SARI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAVILLE, KENDALL MAYALL, TESS PEDERSEN, RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WARD, BRIAN WARD, SARI $1,490.69 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,635.69 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED SEP-24-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, BRIAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2013 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED SEP-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WARD, SARI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-23-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-23-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (3) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
JUDGMENT DEBTORS REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT WARD, BRIAN WARD, SARI
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. (JUDGMENT ENTERED ON: OCT-23-2013).
